name: Chocalate Cream Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips over hot water. Let cool about 10 minutes (any longer and they will stiffen).
2. Whip cream cheese and salt until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add 1/2 cup brown sugar; beat thoroughly.
4. Blend in egg yolk, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add vanilla and chocolate to the mixture and beat thoroughly.
6. Beat egg whites into soft peaks.
7. Gradually add remaining sugar and beat until stiff and glossy.
8. Fold chocolate mixture into egg whites.
9. Fold in whipped cream.
10. Spoon filling into crust and chill overnight.
Chocolate Crumb Crust:
1. Combine crumbs, brown sugar, melted chocolate, and butter, blending thoroughly.
2. Pat the mixture to the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Chill before adding filling.
